en_title: Elon Musk Claims That Before the End of 2026, Grok Will Make a Full-Length AI Movie of The Odyssey 'That Is Historically Accurate and True to the Art of Homer'
cn_title: 马斯克称Grok年内将制作AI版《奥德赛》
subtitle: 要忠于荷马

paragraphs.en: Elon Musk has claimed that Grok will make an AI movie of The Odyssey “that is historically accurate and true to the art of Homer,” by the end of 2026. He did not make any claim about whether it would be any good.
paragraphs.cn: Elon Musk宣称，Grok将在2026年底前制作一部「符合历史事实、忠于荷马艺术」的AI电影《奥德赛》。至于电影是否好看，他没有作出任何承诺。

paragraphs.en: Musk made the prediction while retweeting a 3-minute, AI-generated video of The Odyssey. “Before this year ends, Grok Imagine will make a full-length movie of The Odyssey that is historically accurate and true to the art of Homer,” Musk said.
paragraphs.cn: Musk转发一段由AI生成、时长3分钟的《奥德赛》视频时作出这一预测。他说：「今年结束前，Grok Imagine将制作一部长篇《奥德赛》电影，既符合历史事实，也忠于荷马艺术。」

paragraphs.en: Before this year ends, Grok Imagine will make a full-length movie of The Odyssey that is historically accurate and true to the art of Homer https://t.co/bVHzUmY9WN
paragraphs.cn: 今年结束前，Grok Imagine将制作一部长篇《奥德赛》电影，既符合历史事实，也忠于荷马艺术。https://t.co/bVHzUmY9WN

paragraphs.en: Musk's comment here comes as little surprise, given the X and Tesla owner was a vocal critic of Christopher Nolan’s The Odyssey in the run up to its release in theaters. Much of the online backlash, such as it is, revolved around conservative complaints that Nolan's The Odyssey would be “woke” for starring transgender actor Elliot Page (Sinon), rapper Travis Scott (the Bard), and black actress Lupita Nyong'o (Helen of Troy and her sister, Clytemnestra).
paragraphs.cn: 考虑到这位X与特斯拉老板在克里斯托弗·诺兰版《奥德赛》上映前一直公开批评该片，这番话并不令人意外。网上所谓的抵制很大程度上来自保守派，他们不满影片让跨性别演员Elliot Page饰演Sinon、说唱歌手Travis Scott饰演吟游诗人，以及黑人演员Lupita Nyong'o饰演特洛伊的海伦及其姐妹Clytemnestra，并声称诺兰的《奥德赛》会很「觉醒」。

paragraphs.en: “This is a mythological story,” Nyong’o said in May . “I’m very supportive of Chris’ intention with it and with the version of this story that he is telling. Our cast is representative of the world. I’m not spending my time thinking of a defense. The criticism will exist whether I engage with it or not.”
paragraphs.cn: Nyong'o今年5月表示：「这是一个神话故事。我非常支持Chris的创作意图，也支持他所讲述的这个版本。我们的演员阵容代表了这个世界。我不会花时间为此辩护。无论我是否回应，批评都会存在。」

paragraphs.en: She added: “It’s quite something to be a part of The Odyssey, because it is so grand. It spans worlds. So that’s why the cast is what it is. We’re occupying the epic narrative of our time.”
paragraphs.cn: 她补充道：「能够参与《奥德赛》很不寻常，因为它规模宏大、跨越多个世界。这就是演员阵容如此安排的原因。我们正在演绎属于这个时代的史诗叙事。」

paragraphs.en: Based on the AI video he has retweeted, Musk would consider an all-white version of The Odyssey to be “historically accurate and true to the art of Homer.” British accents seem okay, though.
paragraphs.cn: 从Musk转发的AI视频来看，他似乎认为全白人阵容的《奥德赛》才算「符合历史事实、忠于荷马艺术」。不过，英国口音看来倒是没问题。

paragraphs.en: Ahead of release, The Odyssey was debated across the internet for its casting choices , some of its armor design , and the decision to have its characters speak with contemporary dialogue and in mostly modern American accents . High-profile Greek translators have said they do not take issue with any of that. Rather, .
paragraphs.cn: 上映前，《奥德赛》的选角、部分盔甲设计，以及让角色使用当代对白和大多采用现代美国口音的决定，都在网上引发争论。多名知名希腊文学译者表示，他们并不介意这些问题。相反，[原文此处缺失内容]

paragraphs.en: Prof Daniel Mendelsohn, whose translation of Homer's poem was published last year, said at the UK's Hay Festival in May that he was amused by "all of these bros suddenly worrying about Greek literature". According to a report in The Telegraph , Mendelsohn said: "What's so funny is that Helen has the tiniest role in The Odyssey… so the debate is particularly silly."
paragraphs.cn: Daniel Mendelsohn教授翻译的荷马史诗版本于去年出版。他今年5月在英国Hay Festival表示，看到「这些老兄突然开始担心希腊文学」，自己觉得很有趣。据《每日电讯报》报道，Mendelsohn说：「好笑的是，海伦在《奥德赛》里的戏份少得可怜……所以这场争论格外荒唐。」

paragraphs.en: Nolan himself will likely be unbothered by Musk and any threat from AI to The Odyssey. His adaptation blew away box office expectations with an opening weekend that brought home an incredible $264.064 million worldwide. The split puts the adaptation at a domestic haul of $124.5 million, with international markets accounting for the other $139.564 million. The global total marks Nolan's biggest box office opening weekend ever, towering over his previous achievements, including The Dark Knight Rises at $249 million and The Dark Knight at $198 million.
paragraphs.cn: 克里斯托弗·诺兰本人可能不会在意Musk以及AI对《奥德赛》构成的任何威胁。他的改编电影首周末全球票房达到惊人的2.64064亿美元(约合人民币18亿元)（原文264.064 million美元，约合人民币17.88亿元），远超预期；其中北美票房1.245亿美元(约合人民币8亿元)（原文124.5 million美元，约合人民币8.43亿元），海外市场贡献其余1.39564亿美元(约合人民币9亿元)（原文139.564 million美元，约合人民币9.45亿元）。这也是诺兰职业生涯最高的全球开画成绩，超过《蝙蝠侠：黑暗骑士崛起》的2.49亿美元(约合人民币17亿元)（249 million美元）和《蝙蝠侠：黑暗骑士》的1.98亿美元(约合人民币13亿元)（198 million美元）。

paragraphs.en: The Odyssey is also critically acclaimed, with a 94% rating on Rotten Tomatoes ' Tomatometer, and a 97% rating on its Popcornmeter. IGN's The Odyssey review returned an 8/10. We said: "The Odyssey adapts Homer through a new eye that brings a sense of horror and existential angst to the story – and some humor too. It may not be a perfect movie, but it’s a pretty great moviegoing experience all the same."
paragraphs.cn: 《奥德赛》也获得评论界好评：烂番茄Tomatometer新鲜度94%，Popcornmeter观众评分97%。IGN为《奥德赛》打出8/10。我们写道：「《奥德赛》以全新视角改编荷马史诗，为故事注入恐怖感、存在主义焦虑，也有一些幽默。它或许不是完美的电影，但仍是一次相当出色的观影体验。」

paragraphs.en: Director Ash Koosha recently raised eyebrows for releasing a teaser for Odysseus: The Fall , another take on The Odyssey made entirely by AI. Nolan, meanwhile, has dismissed the tech . “The interesting thing with AI is I’ve never seen a technology that’s been so successfully adopted by Wall Street and by investors and by tech companies that the public has so thoroughly rejected,” he told AFP in Paris.
paragraphs.cn: 导演Ash Koosha最近发布《Odysseus: The Fall》的先导预告，同样以《奥德赛》为题材、且完全由AI制作，引发不少关注。Nolan则对这项技术不以为然。他在巴黎告诉法新社：「AI有一点很有趣：我从未见过一项技术被华尔街、投资者和科技公司如此成功地采用，却又遭到公众如此彻底的抵制。」

paragraphs.en: “It’s just sort of an odd thing. Young people in particular, they coined this term ‘AI slop’,” he added. “There’s a sort of disdain for things AI.”
paragraphs.cn: 他补充道：「这件事很古怪。尤其是年轻人，他们创造了‘AI垃圾’这个词。人们对AI生成的东西带着某种鄙夷。」

summary: Elon Musk宣称Grok Imagine将在2026年底前制作一部长篇AI电影《奥德赛》，并称其会兼顾历史准确性与荷马艺术；此前他曾批评Christopher Nolan版《奥德赛》。
opus_summary: Elon Musk称Grok Imagine将在年内制作长篇AI版《奥德赛》，宣称作品会忠于荷马。此言延续了他对克里斯托弗·诺兰版本的批评。
